title: helianthus winteri
intro: Helianthus winteri, also known as Winter Sunflower or Yellow Sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Helianthus winteri include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in natural medicine.
